name: ofcourse
description: OfCourse - Gestión de Cursos e Inscripciones (Experiencia Integrada)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,portal,nextjs -c blue,green,magenta "cd server && npm run dev" "cd react-portal && npm run dev" "cd nextjs-public && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../react-portal && npm install && cd ../nextjs-public && npm install
